components.value: V, S, M/DF (feathers or droppings from an owl)

area.value: creature touched One creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: The transmuted creature becomes wiser. The spell grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Wisdom, adding the usual benefit to Wisdom-related skills. Clerics, druids, and rangers (and other Wisdom-based spellcasters) who receive owl’s wisdom do not gain any additional bonus spells for the increased Wisdom, but the save DCs for their spells increase. Owl’s Wisdom, Mass
